creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
It is very hard to see what the acatual error is, can you perhaps be 
more precise?  Also, we need to know which version of xserver and the 
xorg meta port you are using, as well as the make and model of your 
graphics card, and which driver is in use.
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
